skills.title: Skills
skills.clawhubApiError: Unable to connect to ClawHub. Check your internet connection.
skills.clawhubRateLimited: ClawHub is currently rate-limiting requests (429). Retry in {{seconds}}s; if you are not signed in yet, sign in first.
skills.clawhubAuthUnavailable: ClawHub CLI login status is currently unavailable.
skills.clawhubAuthLoggedOut: ClawHub is not signed in. Please sign in before installing.
skills.clawhubNeedLoginFirst: The current session is not signed in. This 429 is more likely a missing ClawHub login than a Desktop issue.
skills.clawhubLoginUnavailable: Unable to start the ClawHub login flow. Check that the ClawHub CLI is installed.
skills.hubInstallDoneHint: Active on next conversation — no restart needed
skills.hubSourceClawhub: Using ClawHub (SkillHub unavailable in this network)
skills.noSkillsHint: Browse the Marketplace tab to install skills
skills.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently remove the skill files from ~/.openclaw/skills/. The skill will be gone after Gateway restart.
skills.skillshubCliInstalled: SkillHub CLI ready — installs use Tencent CDN
skills.skillshubCliInstallOk: SkillHub CLI installed — installs now use Tencent CDN
skills.skillshubCliInstallFail: Auto-install failed. Copy the command and run it in a terminal.
skills.skillshubCliInstallFailWin: Auto-install failed. Copy the command and run it in PowerShell.
skills.skillshubCliHint: Skills install faster from China via Tencent CDN. Optional — skills still work without it.
skills.skillshubCliRequired: SkillHub CLI is required to install skills. Click to auto-install.
skills.skillshubFallbackNote: SkillHub API is unreachable — showing ClawHub catalog (same content). Installation will still use Tencent CDN when available.
skills.skillshubApiError: SkillHub is only accessible from mainland China networks. Browse the website directly or search ClawHub above.
skills.skillshubTop50Hint: Official curated list from SkillHub — the most recommended skills

memory.apiOptionDesc: Connect to a Memory API server for semantic search and management

theme.eyecareDescription: Warm sepia palette for long reading sessions.

common.screenRecordHint: Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording,

analytics.title: Full Analytics
analytics.cacheAtReduced: tokens at reduced rate — significant savings!
analytics.missingPricing: {{count}} entries use unknown models — some costs may be incomplete.
analytics.connectFirst: Connect to Gateway to view analytics.

mcpTools.comingSoonDesc: Connect external tools via Model Context Protocol (MCP). GitHub, Slack, Google, databases, and more — directly from JunQi Desktop.

chat.deleteSessionConfirm: Delete this session and its history? This cannot be undone.
chat.resetSessionConfirm: Clear conversation history for this session? The session will be kept.
chat.queued: Queued — will send when AI finishes current reply
chat.budgetExceededDesc: 30-day spend $${used} reached the limit $${limit}. Raise the budget in Settings or pause usage.
chat.budgetLimitHint: 0 = no limit. New messages are blocked once exceeded.

input.voiceWakeCaptured: Voice wake captured (no transcription on this webview; audio saved)

screenshot.title: Screenshot
screenshot.permissionHint: Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording, enable JunQi Desktop then retry.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.notAvailable: Terminal is only available in the desktop app.

offline.title: Not Connected
offline.description: Unable to connect to OpenClaw Gateway. The app will reconnect automatically when the gateway becomes available.
offline.connectingDescription: OpenClaw Gateway is starting and the app is establishing a connection automatically.
offline.connectingHint: The first cold start can take longer. Please wait a moment.

notifications.pairedBody: JunQi Desktop successfully paired with Gateway
notifications.title: Notifications

configInvalid.title: Config File Corrupted
configInvalid.hint: The openclaw.json config file contains invalid JSON. This can happen when a multi-agent conversation writes an incorrect config update. The app tried to restore the previous backup automatically. Use Reset Config to remove the broken file and let the gateway start fresh.

configSchemaInvalid.title: Config Values Invalid
configSchemaInvalid.hint: The openclaw.json config file has invalid values, such as an unrecognized binding type or a missing required field. This often happens when a multi-agent conversation writes an incorrect config. The app tried to restore your previous backup automatically. Click Retry to try again, or Reset Config to start fresh.

portInUse.title: Port Already in Use
portInUse.hint: Another process is using the gateway port and could not be stopped automatically. If another app is already using port 18789, close it and click Retry. If the OpenClaw CLI gateway is running, the desktop should connect to it automatically.

timeout.title: Gateway Startup Timed Out
timeout.hint: The gateway process started but did not become ready in time. This can happen after sleep/wake or under heavy load. Click Retry to try again.

notFound.title: Gateway Not Found
notFound.hint: The bundled Node.js or openclaw.mjs could not be located. The installation may be incomplete. Try reinstalling JunQi Desktop.

crash.title: Gateway Crashed on Start
crash.hint: The gateway process exited immediately. Check the logs below for details. A corrupted config file or missing dependency is the most common cause.

unknown.title: Gateway Failed to Start
unknown.hint: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs below for details.

reset.removed: Config file removed. It will be recreated on next start.

media.imageControls: Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan · R to rotate · 0 to reset · Esc to close

pairing.openTerminal: Open Terminal and run: openclaw gateway approve
pairing.orApproveFromUI: Or approve from the OpenClaw Control UI
pairing.needsApprovalDesc: Your device needs approval from OpenClaw Gateway. Open Terminal on the Gateway machine and run:
pairing.orApproveFromUIFull: Or approve from the OpenClaw Control UI (Dashboard)
pairing.oneTimeOnly: Approval is needed once only — after that it connects automatically
pairing.enterTokenDesc: Enter the Gateway Token from OpenClaw settings:
pairing.tokenExplanation: JunQi Desktop needs a valid token to connect to the OpenClaw Gateway. This pairing is done once only.

settingsExtra.context1mDesc: Enable Anthropic 1M context beta for Opus / Sonnet — increases context to 1,000,000 tokens
settingsExtra.toolIntentDesc: Show tool calls in chat as cards with input/output — hidden by default

cronTemplates.morningDesc: Weather, news, and memory review every morning
cronTemplates.checkInDesc: Periodic nudge if anything needs attention
cronTemplates.healthDesc: Disk, RAM, uptime, and process monitoring

config.title: Config Manager
config.noFile: No configuration file found. Set the path in Settings.
config.apiKeyStoredInEnv: Key is stored in env; leave empty to keep
config.connectionReachableCheckKey: {{status}} — Connection reachable, check API Key or permissions
config.addFirstProvider: Add your first AI provider to get started
config.addFirstAgent: Add your first agent to get started
config.removeAgentConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove agent "{{name}}"?
config.mainAgentReserved: Main agent is already in the list
config.removeChannelConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the {{channel}} channel?
config.addFirstChannel: Add your first channel to get started
config.dangerousWarning: ⚠️ Dangerous — only use if you know what you're doing
config.webToolsHint: Search and fetch are off by default. Enable below and save config; restart Gateway for changes to take effect.
config.noWebSearchToolsConfigured: No web search providers configured yet
config.noWebFetchToolsConfigured: No web fetch providers configured yet
config.toolBlockedHint: Current allow/deny policies may block web search or fetch tools.
config.useSharedCredential: Reuse provider credential from model settings
config.apiKeyPlaceholderReuseModel: Leave empty to reuse provider credential
config.apiKeyHintSharedConfigured: Shared credential is configured and can be reused.
config.apiKeyHintSharedMissing: No shared credential found. Please enter one here.
config.apiKeyHintNotShared: This provider does not support shared model credential reuse.
config.rawJsonHint: Edit the full configuration as JSON. Be careful — invalid JSON will not be applied.
config.noModelsConfiguredHint: No models configured. Add providers in Config Manager.
config.addAuthProfileHint: Add an auth profile for full configuration
config.manageProvidersDesc: Manage providers, models, and API keys
config.codingPlanAdvisory: Coding Plan uses a dedicated API Key and endpoint — do not mix with your general API Key. Get the key from the provider's "Coding Plan" console.
config.localProviderAdvisory: Local and custom endpoints run on your own machine or private server — no cloud API Key needed. vLLM / Custom requires a Base URL; Ollama defaults to localhost:11434.
config.providerIdHint: Written to models.providers[id] in OpenClaw config. Defaults to "custom".
config.baseUrlDriftWarning: ⚠️ Drifted from recommended endpoint ({{url}}) — verify before continuing.
config.modelIdHint: Enter model names, confirm with Enter or comma. OpenClaw will prefix with {{providerId}}/
config.providerBrokenNeedSecret: Desktop cannot see this secret. It may be supplied by Gateway runtime or system environment. If OpenClaw Web UI can answer, no action is required.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
calendar.deleteConfirmHint: The linked reminder will also be removed.

audit.title: Secrets Audit
audit.subtitle: Scan config for plaintext secrets and unresolved refs
audit.unresolved: 🔴 Unresolved — secret refs could not be resolved

providers.title: Secret Providers
providers.subtitle: Configured sources for secret resolution (read-only — edit via Advanced → Raw JSON)

reload.title: Reload Secrets
reload.subtitle: Re-resolves all secret refs and swaps the runtime snapshot
reload.hint: Use this after updating secret values in your providers (environment variables, files, etc.) to apply them without restarting the gateway.

fileManager.title: File Manager
fileManager.noFilesDesc: No readable files in this folder, or the path is inaccessible.
fileManager.noBridgeDesc: File management requires the Electron IPC bridge (window.aegis). This feature is only available inside JunQi Desktop.
fileManager.uploadsDesc: Manage files you uploaded into managed storage.
fileManager.noOutputFilesDesc: Output file references will appear here when this lane is enabled.
fileManager.noUploadFilesDesc: Files you upload in chat will appear here for preview and export.
fileManager.deleteOutputFileConfirm: Delete this file from disk? This cannot be undone.
fileManager.missingFileDesc: This file reference no longer points to an existing file.

setup.title: Welcome to JunQi Desktop
setup.chooseMode: Choose how you want to set up the OpenClaw Gateway.
setup.subtitle: Installing required components. This may take a few minutes.
setup.modeNativeDesc: Install Node.js, Git, and OpenClaw directly on your machine. Best for most users.
setup.modeDockerDesc: Run OpenClaw in a Docker container. Requires Docker Desktop.
setup.gitRequiredDesc: Git is required for the installation. Please install Git manually, then retry.
setup.gatewayNotRunning: Gateway is not running. Click below to start it.
